name: fpf
description: First Principles Framework coordination patterns for specialists, teams, and AI agents. Output stays in plain language.

interface.shortDescription: Structured coordination analysis in plain language.
interface.longDescription: Applies First Principles Framework coordination patterns to team alignment, terminology, contracts, decisions, assurance, and system-composition problems while keeping framework terminology out of the final answer.
